title: NR30 3QF, ASCO UK Limited environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3630YS/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: ASCO UK Limited Installation name: Great Yarmouth Technical Waste Management Centre Permit number: EPR/GP3630YS/V002  "
